description: Comprehensive handwritten and digital notes covering the complete GATE Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE) syllabus with theory, formulas, solved examples, and previous year questions.

resources.title: Engineering Mathematics
resources.subtitle: Handwritten Notes
resources.description: Linear Algebra, Calculus, Differential Equations, Complex Variables, Probability, Numerical Methods and Vector Calculus with GATE PYQs.

resources.title: Network Theory
resources.subtitle: Digital PDF
resources.description: Network theorems, transient and steady-state analysis, graph theory, two-port networks, resonance and AC circuit analysis.

resources.title: Analog Circuits
resources.subtitle: Class Notes
resources.description: Diode circuits, BJT and MOSFET amplifiers, operational amplifiers, feedback amplifiers, oscillators, power amplifiers and active filters.

resources.title: Digital Circuits
resources.subtitle: Digital Notes
resources.description: Boolean algebra, logic gates, combinational and sequential circuits, flip-flops, counters, registers, memories, ADCs and DACs.

resources.title: Signals and Systems
resources.subtitle: Handwritten Notes
resources.description: Continuous and discrete-time signals, Fourier Series, Fourier Transform, Laplace Transform, Z-Transform, sampling and LTI systems.

resources.title: Communications
resources.subtitle: Class Notes
resources.description: Analog and digital communication, modulation techniques, information theory, source and channel coding, noise analysis and wireless communication.

resources.title: Electromagnetics
resources.subtitle: Handwritten Notes
resources.description: Electrostatics, magnetostatics, Maxwell's equations, electromagnetic waves, transmission lines, waveguides and antennas.

resources.title: Control Systems
resources.subtitle: Digital Notes
resources.description: Transfer functions, block diagrams, signal flow graphs, stability analysis, Root Locus, Bode plots, Nyquist criterion and State Space.

resources.title: Electronic Devices
resources.subtitle: Class Notes
resources.description: Semiconductor physics, PN junction, BJT, MOSFET, FET, optoelectronic devices, fabrication technology and integrated circuits.

resources.title: Microprocessors
resources.subtitle: Digital PDF
resources.description: 8085 and 8086 architecture, instruction sets, programming, memory organization, interfacing, peripherals and microcontrollers.
